title: T-027 — E2E: P1 reporting acceptance spine — fresh org → 10 dashboards renderable → export PDF/CSV → audit trail (12-REPORTING §2 P1, §11)
prompt:
# T-027 — End-to-end P1 reporting acceptance test

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §2 Metryki sukcesu Phase 1 (P95 < 2s, 100% accuracy vs Excel, 0 cross-tenant leaks, > 99.9% export success), §11 V-RPT-ACCESS / V-RPT-EXPORT / V-RPT-REFRESH spine
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Playwright E2E spec that drives the full P1 acceptance: fresh org provisioned → 08-PROD seeded with WO outputs/consumptions → MV refresh worker runs → all 10 P1 dashboards render under reporting_viewer session → admin runs Force Refresh on a data source → export PDF and CSV from Factory Overview → verify report_access_audits + report_exports + mv_refresh_log all populated. Cross-org leak test runs as final assertion.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/e2e/reporting/p1-spine.spec.ts` Playwright spec:
   - beforeAll: seed two orgs (A + B); seed 08-PROD wo_outputs + wo_consumptions for both; seed 09-QA quality_holds + hold_items for both; trigger T-005 worker for all P1 MVs.
   - Login as org_A reporting_viewer: navigate to /reporting; assert catalog renders with 10 P1 cards + freshness badges; click each card → assert page renders without error.
   - Switch to org_A admin: open /reporting/settings → Data Sources → Force Refresh on mv_yield_by_line_week → assert toast + mv_refresh_log row updated.
   - Back to dashboard: open Factory Overview → click Export → PDF; assert toast + Download button; download file; verify SHA-256 matches report_exports.sha256_hash.
   - Repeat for CSV; verify UTF-8 BOM + row count matches MV query.
   - Cross-org leak test: login as org_B reporting_viewer → assert org_B sees its own KPIs only, NEVER org_A's data (KPI numbers must differ; same dashboard layout but different data).
   - Negative path: login as user without rpt.dashboard.view → assert /reporting redirects to /403 + report_access_audits row.
2. Vitest integration test `packages/reporting/__tests__/p1-spine-integration.test.ts` covers DB-level invariants: cross-org leak via service helpers + MV row counts + audit row writes.

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/reporting/p1-spine.spec.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/__tests__/p1-spine-integration.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/reporting/fixtures/seed-helpers.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given fresh DB + seeded orgs A+B + worker run, when the Playwright spec executes end-to-end, then all 10 P1 dashboard pages render under reporting_viewer for org_A without uncaught errors; navigation between pages preserves URL state.
2. Given Force Refresh is invoked from /reporting/settings, when complete, then a new mv_refresh_log row exists with status='completed' + duration_ms > 0.
3. Given PDF export completes, when downloaded, then SHA-256 of downloaded file equals report_exports.sha256_hash AND file has @media print CSS applied (verified by html2pdf metadata or print-css selector presence in the underlying renderer).
4. Given CSV export completes, when downloaded, then file starts with UTF-8 BOM (0xEF 0xBB 0xBF) AND row count equals service-helper row count for the same filter.
5. Given org_B reporting_viewer logs in, when they navigate to /reporting/factory-overview, then KPI numbers differ from org_A (cross-org leak test — both layouts identical, data different).
6. Given a user without rpt.dashboard.view permission accesses /reporting/factory-overview, when middleware T-009 fires, then they are redirected to /403 + a report_access_audits row with result='deny' is written.
7. P95 page load < 2s on test environment per §2 Metryki — assert via Playwright `page.evaluate(() => performance.timing)` or PerformanceObserver.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: Playwright spec asserts all 7 ACs; integration test asserts DB invariants.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting/p1-spine && pnpm --filter @monopilot/reporting test p1-spine-integration`.
- GREEN: build seed helpers + spec + integration test. (Most production code is already built in T-001..T-026 — this task is the integration smoke.)

## Risk red lines
- Do not stub MV refresh — run actual worker job (T-005) so concurrency + advisory lock paths are exercised.
- Do not skip cross-org leak assertion — the headline metric is '0 cross-tenant leaks' (§2).
- Do not skip P95 < 2s assertion — fundamental P1 success criterion.
- Do not let Playwright spec depend on production data — use isolated test DB (testcontainers or Supabase branch).
- Do not let the spec drive 15-OEE / 11-SHIPPING / 10-FINANCE source seeding — those modules have 0 atomic tasks; assert graceful degradation paths only.
- Do not let the spec depend on dashboards_catalog ordering — assert by id, never by index.
- Do not let the spec write to 08-PROD / 09-QA mutation paths — read-only consumer pattern.

pipeline_inputs.description: Playwright E2E spec + integration test covering 10 P1 dashboards + Force Refresh + PDF/CSV export + cross-org leak + permission deny + P95 < 2s.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single integration spine for module acceptance. Runs MV worker, exports both formats, verifies SHA-256 + UTF-8 BOM, asserts cross-org isolation + audit writes + P95 perf.
out_of_scope: Do not implement P2 dashboards / E3 / E4 features
Do not implement scheduled reports E2E (P2)
cross_module_dependencies: 00-FOUNDATION T-111 apps/worker scaffold (for T-005 invocation in spec)
acceptance_criteria: Given a report/export query targets a table with PII columns, when the result set is materialized, then no raw PII column value appears in any row (redacted, hashed, or omitted at the read-model boundary).
Given Force Refresh invoked from /reporting/settings, when complete, then new mv_refresh_log row exists with status='completed' + duration_ms > 0
Given org_B reporting_viewer logs in, when navigating to /reporting/factory-overview, then KPI numbers differ from org_A (cross-org leak test)

Given edge and compliance cases are exercised, when each condition is triggered, then all 10 P1 dashboard pages render under reporting_viewer for org_A without uncaught errors; URL state preserved and SHA-256 of downloaded file equals report_exports.sha256_hash AND file has @media print CSS applied.
test_strategy: RED: Playwright spec asserts all 7 ACs; integration test asserts DB invariants
Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting/p1-spine && pnpm --filter @monopilot/reporting test p1-spine-integration`
Attach Playwright trace + screenshots + downloaded export samples in closeout
risk_red_lines: Do not stub MV refresh — run actual T-005 worker job so concurrency + advisory lock paths are exercised
Do not skip cross-org leak assertion — headline metric is '0 cross-tenant leaks'
Do not let spec depend on production data — isolated test DB only
Do not seed 15-OEE / 11-SHIPPING / 10-FINANCE sources — assert graceful degradation paths only
Do not let spec depend on dashboards_catalog ordering — assert by id
Do not let spec mutate 08-PROD / 09-QA — read-only consumer

No raw PII in reports/exports — PII columns (email, phone, address, surname, dob, national_id) must be redacted, hashed, or omitted at the read-model boundary. Consult Foundation T-117 pino redact allowlist for the canonical PII column set.
Dispatch all bulk export and long-running report generation to apps/worker background queue (foundation T-111); synchronous compute forbidden in request path for jobs that may time out.
